name: the mapping ties each EO section (2, 3, 4) to at least one plugin control that satisfies it
command: ruby -ryaml -e 'd=YAML.unsafe_load_file(ARGV[0]); secs=d["controls"].map{|c| c["section"]}.uniq.sort; ok=([2,3,4]-secs).empty? && d["controls"].all?{|c| (c["maps_to"]||[]).size>0}; exit(ok ? 0 : 1)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/eo-control-mapping.yaml" && echo c22-sections-map 1>&2
